title: Heeria subtriplinervia

Heeria subtriplinervia is native to South Africa and is classified as a shrub or small tree. It is a member of the order Sapindales and the class Magnoliopsida. The classification of Heeria subtriplinervia provides valuable information about its evolutionary history and relationships with other plants.
